name: Club fws
description: Come play pickleball at Club fws in Marion, MS! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is private.

name: Northeast Park Tennis Center
description: Northeast Park Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Meridian, MS. There are 10 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Sammie Davidson Sport Complex
description: Sammie Davidson Sport Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Meridian, MS. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights. You can’t reserve the courts.
